name: Roommates between Worlds
description:
After your death, you go to court, where will you go to heaven or hell? But before that, you're left with two guys, an angel and a demon.

Simon is an Angel

He's not as cute and harmless as he looks. He's a real evil, haha

Carson is a demon

He is the complete opposite of Simon, he is kind and caring.
creator: Raer
